heading: Art. 61. Waiver of right to appeal; withdrawal of appeal
label: 861 Art. 61. Waiver of right to appeal; withdrawal of appeal
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)86150:648.(Art. 61), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 127The word “each” is substituted for the word “every”.

children.text: signed by the accused and by defense counsel; and
attached to the record of trial.

children.heading: .—Withdrawal of Appeal
children.label: b .—Withdrawal of Appeal
children.text: In a general or special court-martial, the accused may withdraw an appeal at any time.

children.heading: .—Death Penalty Case Exception
children.label: c .—Death Penalty Case Exception
children.text: Notwithstanding subsections (a) and (b), an accused may not waive the right to appeal or withdraw an appeal with respect to a judgment that includes a sentence of death.

children.heading: .—Waiver or Withdrawal as Bar
children.label: d .—Waiver or Withdrawal as Bar
children.text: Except as provided by (article 69(c)(2)), a waiver or withdrawal under this section bars review under (article 66).section 869(c)(2) of this titlesection 866 of this title
